Class BooleanFunctionProblem

java.lang.Object
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.crypto.AbstractBooleanFunctionProblem<BitString>
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.crypto.BooleanFunctionProblem
All Implemented Interfaces:
Problem<BitString>
public final class BooleanFunctionProblem extends AbstractBooleanFunctionProblem<BitString>
Boolean-function optimization over direct truth-table bitstring encoding.
